current_problem.description: Long chats lose continuity; new windows fail to understand project state; documentation became over-expanded and duplicated.
current_problem.immediate_priority: Stabilize machine-readable project memory before any new Tokenoskobi feature.

next_safe_step.name: RUNTIME_UPDATE
next_safe_step.instruction: Continue only with the declared next step.

open_risks: Runtime files may continue changing while news timer runs.
Matcher returns zero because token_score_100_events lacks name/symbol/address.
News intelligence must not be limited to DEX token matching; narrative, opportunity, and risk layers are required.
closure_rule: No work unit is closed unless PROJECT_RUNTIME.json is updated after GitHub seal.
